title: 兵祸地狱难度
summary: 地狱3之前所有关卡都很简单，地狱3难度突然提升，感觉过了一个阈值。另外，技能CD是在行动前减少。4回合CD指释放后的第四个回合可以再次释放。Boss技能介绍【身体】【右手】【左手】失败原因分析角色被动【芙蕾雅】匠的加防可以触发2次梦引，然后加盾再触发一次梦引。【梨梨】【缬草】第一轮【左手】攻击，随机
content_json: 34)","bold":true,"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"Xvdnf5QzJ1p0veut","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_618/h_141/50364/253894/2025/8/12/85650.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"618px","height":"141px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"先秒左手，夜离追击暴击伤害"},{"type":"image","key":"2uei1aY6wMvSSTuk","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_141/h_88/50364/253894/2025/8/12/794718.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"118px","height":"74px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"，谛听S3暴击伤害"},{"type":"image","key":"URZgDIoKIBKJC2TP","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_131/h_81/50364/253894/2025/8/12/478517.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"126px","height":"78px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"3dpsbIX87BjV5Ods","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_981/h_316/50364/253894/2025/8/12/779105.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":false,"style":{"width":"853px","height":"275px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"第二轮"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"fjHGX0ZL8vrHu2L4","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_896/h_139/50364/253894/2025/8/12/529817.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"896px","height":"139px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"glVtyS0VthKZECZP","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_985/h_318/50364/253894/2025/8/12/205697.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"985px","height":"318px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夜离和谛听靠攻击回血，回满了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"第三轮"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"DPbDjQbs8mPfefdT","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_939/h_140/50364/253894/2025/8/12/443741.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"939px","height":"140px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"JkTKaT95hzPqJzyD","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_981/h_324/50364/253894/2025/8/12/772686.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"981px","height":"324px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夜离和谛听靠攻击回血，回满了。克洛斯濒死，但没触发锁血。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"第四轮"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"tGxqkrqGZPiQcn5S","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_791/h_141/50364/253894/2025/8/12/456834.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"791px","height":"141px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":"jSySo1SSim5Mnzjx","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_226/h_311/50364/253894/2025/8/12/782131.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"226px","height":"311px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":"               boss攻击后  "},{"type":"image","key":"nDVMR4AbmVDy2d1e","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_219/h_316/50364/253894/2025/8/12/787053.png","alt":"","isAdaptive":true,"style":{"width":"219px","height":"316px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"谛听S3收掉boss"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"通关要点：谛听和夜离输出要够高，要保证打4轮，也是打两个S3能收掉boss。芙蕾雅要高速高命中，保证推条和拉条。克洛斯肉度要高，保证克洛斯不要触发锁血，触发了下次aoe前就没盾，就必死。同时缬草血量也要高，保证护盾能扛住一次aoe。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"总结：双C堆爆伤，芙蕾雅堆高速高命中，克洛斯2命中1防御，缬草3血量。","bold":true,"color":"rgb(255, 0, 0)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"细节："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"1 克洛斯速度不能太快，开局克罗斯要在boss身体释放技能后再放S3，否则会浪费一回合减抗。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"2 重中之重是芙蕾雅的普攻挂梦魇，挂不上就没推条，就扛不住。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
